items.title: Private equity firm Audax Group seeks over $1.5 billion for BlueCat Networks, sources say
items.description: Private equity firm Audax Group is ​exploring a sale of cybersecurity provider ‌BlueCat Networks, which could fetch more than $1.5 ‌billion, according to people familiar with the matter.  The private equity firm, which bought BlueCat in 2022, has hired JPMorgan ⁠to run ‌the sale process, which is currently under way, several of ‍the sources said.  Representatives for Audax Group and BlueCat did not respond to requests for ​comment, while a spokesperson for JPMorgan declined ‌to comment.

items.title: Space Stock Boom: Why Retail and Wall Street Are Aligning
items.description: Retail investors and major Wall Street banks are uniting behind the orbital economy as space technology matures into a viable industrial asset class.

items.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Welcomes Pam Hess as Retirement Strategist
items.description: J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the appointment of Pam Hess as Executive Director and Retirement Strategist on the Retirement Insights team reporting to Michael Conrath, Chief Retirement Strategist. This key hire reflects the firm's ongoing commitment to investing in resources that help financial professionals, participants and plan sponsors navigate today's complex retirement landscape.
